title: Baking Mod
description: make pizzas, more pies, cookies and candy!
body:
[![Logo](https://img1.wsimg.com/isteam/ip/b3784fc8-73a8-4ed5-9033-feb6c6f2806c/blob-19e676c.png/:/rs=w:149,h:149,cg:true,m/cr=w:149,h:149/qt=q:95)](https://exlinemods.com/) Explore Exline Mods for top-notch gaming accessories and mods. Elevate your gaming experience with our high-quality products. Visit exlinemods.com now to gear up and enhance your gameplay! This Mod adds a bunch of new food items to minecraft! Originally, this started as my flour and dough mod, but I've expanded upon that!
Here is a complete list of added items and how to get them
Flour - Crafted from wheat
Dough - Crafted from flour and water
Salt - Found while mining stone
Cookie Dough - Made from water, flour, egg, and sugar
Chocolate Cookie Dough - Made from water, flour, egg, sugar, and choco beans
Sugar Cookies - Made by cooking cookie dough in furnace
Cream - Crafted from milk
Cheese - Crafted from cream
Butter - Made by cooking cream in furnace
Pepperoni - Crafted frim cooked pork and beef
Tomato - New crop to be harvested
Tomato Seeds - Found in tall grass or crafted from tomato
Olive - Found in tree leaves
Olive Oil - Made by cooking olives in furnace
Pizza Dough - Crafted from water, flour, sugar, salt, and olive oil
Raw Pizzas - Crafted with pizza dough, tomato, cheese and choice of
toppings Cooked Pizzas - Made by cooking raw pizzas in furnace
Now with frosted sugar cookies!
The complete list of colors you can use; blue, light-blue, white, cyan, orange, yellow, red, pink, magenta, purple, lime-green, and I think that's it!
